configurations.name: web
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent; pnpm --filter @uploads/web exec astro dev --port ${PORT:-4321}

configurations.name: stack
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent; node scripts/dev-stack.mjs

configurations.name: stack-raw
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent; PORTLESS=0 node scripts/dev-stack.mjs

configurations.name: api
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent; pnpm --filter @uploads/api exec wrangler dev --port ${PORT:-8787}
